/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++14 -Wextra -Wall -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/pointpillar.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o pointpillar   -L/jetson-inference/another/CUDA-PointPillars/build  -Wl,-rpath,/jetson-inference/another/CUDA-PointPillars/build /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl -lrt libpointpillar_core.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lnvinfer
